faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to what Denver homeowners ask us most.

items.a: Cleaning is quote-based because every home is different. Price depends on your home's size, how often you'd like service, and the type of cleaning. Request a free quote and we'll give you a clear, fair price — recurring clients save with weekly, bi-weekly, and monthly discounts.

items.q: Are you reliable? Do you ever cancel?
items.a: Reliability is what we're known for. In 8+ years of serving the Denver metro, we've missed only one scheduled cleaning. When we say we'll be there, we're there.

items.q: Will it be the same people each time?
items.a: Yes. We're a small family business, so you get the same trusted people — not a rotating crew of strangers walking into your home.

items.q: Do I need to provide cleaning supplies?
items.a: No — we bring our own supplies and equipment. If you'd prefer we use specific products (for allergies, pets, or surfaces), just let us know.

items.q: Do I have to be home during the cleaning?
items.a: It's up to you. Many clients give us access while they're at work; others prefer to be home. Whatever you're comfortable with — we're careful and respectful either way.
Yes. We're fully bilingual and serve our Denver clients in both English and Spanish. Sí, hablamos español.
We serve Denver and the surrounding metro, including Aurora, Lakewood, Centennial, Englewood, Littleton, Arvada, Westminster, Thornton, and more. Not sure if you're covered? Just call.

ctaBand.title: Ready for a cleaner who actually shows up?
ctaBand.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation quote today. Phone is fastest — but we'll happily reply to your request.

Baseboards, door frames, and detailed dusting

moveInOut.desc: A complete clean for an empty home — ideal for renters wanting their deposit back, sellers prepping to list, or new owners starting fresh. Great for Airbnb and short-term-rental turnovers too.
features: Full deep clean of an empty space
Turnover-ready for the next tenant or owner

hero.title: A local family business built on trust
hero.subtitle: Janet's Cleaning is owned and operated by Janet Liliana — serving the Denver metro for 8+ years with dependable, detail-oriented cleaning.

story.title: Cleaning Denver homes like they're our own
paragraphs: Janet's Cleaning started with a simple belief: people deserve a cleaner they can truly trust — someone who shows up, does careful work, and treats your home with respect.

For more than 8 years, owner Janet Liliana has built the business on word of mouth across the Denver metro, earning loyal clients one spotless home at a time. As a small, family-owned service, you get the same trusted people every visit — not a rotating crew. In all those years, we've missed just one scheduled cleaning.

Because so many of our neighbors are Spanish-speaking, being fully bilingual has always been at the heart of what we do. Scheduling, questions, and special requests are easy in English or Spanish — and the price is always fair.

items.title: Trust & respect
items.desc: The same family team treats your home and belongings with the care they deserve.

pricing.title: How our pricing works
pricing.subtitle: Cleaning is quote-based because no two spaces are alike. Your price depends on three things:

factors.title: Home or office size
factors.desc: Bedrooms, bathrooms, and square footage — bigger spaces take more time.

factors.title: How often you clean
factors.desc: Recurring weekly, bi-weekly, and monthly plans cost less per visit than one-time cleans.

factors.title: Type of cleaning
factors.desc: Standard upkeep, a full deep clean, or a move-in/move-out each take a different level of work.

pricing.discountNote: Recurring clients save the most — ask about our weekly, bi-weekly, and monthly discounts.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Janet's Cleaning ("we," "us") respects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect through this website and how we use it.

sections.p: When you request a quote or contact us, we collect the information you choose to provide — such as your name, phone number, email address, property location, and details about the cleaning you need. We may also collect basic, non-identifying usage data through standard web analytics.
We use your information solely to respond to your request, provide a quote, schedule and deliver our services, and communicate with you about your cleaning. We do not sell your personal information.
By submitting a quote request, you agree that we may contact you by phone, text message, or email regarding your request. You can opt out of further communication at any time by telling us.

We do not sell or rent your personal information. We may share it only with trusted service providers who help us operate (for example, email or hosting), and only as needed to serve you, or when required by law.

We keep your information only as long as needed to serve you and meet legal obligations, and we take reasonable measures to protect it. No method of transmission over the internet is completely secure.
You may request that we update or delete the personal information you've shared with us by contacting us using the details on our Contact page.
We may update this policy from time to time. The latest version will always be posted on this page.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms apply to your use of the Janet's Cleaning website and your request for our services.

sections.p: This website provides information about our cleaning services and lets you request a free quote. Quotes provided are estimates and are not a binding contract until confirmed directly with us.
Cleaning is quote-based. Final pricing depends on the size of your space, the frequency of service, the type of cleaning, and any add-ons. We'll confirm pricing with you before any work begins.
We do our best to arrive on time and as scheduled. We ask for reasonable notice to cancel or reschedule so we can serve all of our clients well.
If something about your cleaning isn't right, let us know promptly and we'll work to make it right.
To the extent permitted by law, our liability is limited to the value of the specific service provided. Nothing in these terms excludes liability that cannot be excluded under applicable law.
Questions about these terms? Reach us using the details on our Contact page.
